title: Notification No.46/2000-Cus(NT), dated 6.7.2000
text: TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY PART-H, SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (i), DATED THE 6th JULY, 2000 15 ASADHA 1922 SAKA GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF FINANCE (DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE ) New Delhi, the 6th Julv.2000 15 Asadha 1922 Saka NOTIFICATION NO. 46/2000-CUSTOMS( N.T ) G.S.R. (E ) - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962 ), the Central Government hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Kandla to be the Commissioner of Customs, Mumbai and Commissioner of Customs. Calcutta for the purpose of adjudicating the Show Cause Notice No.50D/20A/96 dated the 29th March,2000 pertaining to M/s. Ganapati Commerce Limited, AJC Bose Road, Calcutta and No.50D/20B/96-CI. dated the 29th March,2000 pertaining to M/s. Ganapati Combines Limited, AJC Bose Road, Calcutta issued by Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi. (RAJENDRA SINGH) UNDER SECRETARY TO THE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA F.N0.437/10/2000-CUS.IV -- 1 of 1 --
